name: WATERFALL

meta.data_required: a start total + signed delta steps; end total is computed, never supplied

alternatives: CH-DEV-01 (diverging bar, when steps are independent)

use_when: explaining how a total moved from A to B through named drivers
not_when: independent variances with no running total (use CH-DEV-01)
any cumulative level would go below zero on the canvas

data_shape.title: string, action title stating the end-to-end move with a number
data_shape.eyebrow: string caps, rendered only when the DL chrome asks for it
data_shape.unit: string, appears once, on the start bar label
data_shape.steps: array of {label, delta} with sign; rendered in given order
data_shape.end_label: string label for the computed end bar

scale.note: bars scale to the max cumulative level; baseline zero; direct labels, no axis

rules: the end bar is COMPUTED from start + deltas; supplying it is a validation error
increases and decreases colored by semantic roles, totals in ink
delta labels signed (+12 / -6); unit once on the start label
dashed connectors carry the running level between bars
step order is the data's order; the renderer never re-sorts a bridge
anti_patterns: supplying the end total as data (it must reconcile by construction)
sorting steps by size (a bridge is a narrative, keep the told order)
qa: end bar equals start + sum of deltas
every delta label carries its sign
unit exactly once, on the start label
title states the end-to-end move with a number
